programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Atlanta, a woman is found dead in a garbage can and a young man is ambushed by neighborhood bullies.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A young Atlanta man is shot and left to die in the bushes; a police detective's main clue in the case is a mysterious white town car.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A New Orleans detective battles fear and distrust on the street as he works the case of a man who was executed in broad daylight; a Minneapolis man witnesses the murder of his teenage son.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: A night out leaves an innocent man dead; detectives follow up on solid leads that go nowhere, then discover a motive they never expected.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Memphis, Tennessee, Sgt. Caroline Mason takes it personally when a 75-year-old man is shot dead in her old neighborhood.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Dallas, Detectives Bob Ermatinger and Ken Penrod investigate the murder of an unidentified young woman found shot to death at White Rock Lake.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In Memphis, a gas station clerk is shot in an armed robbery. The clerk hits the store's panic button, locking his killer inside. Moments later, the clerk dies from his wounds.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Humans can survive catastrophic injuries and deadly scenarios that defy the odds in ways that are inexplicable; these survivals challenge the best attempts to explain how anyone could live through such circumstances.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Could a cache of fantastic riches have been buried centuries ago on a tiny island in the North Atlantic?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: King Arthur, England's first pop culture superhero; his exploits inspired blockbuster movies and television series like "Middle Earth", "Harry Potter", "Game of Thrones" and "Star Wars"; the significant impact of Arthurian legend on Western culture.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Whether surviving freezing temperatures, diving unfathomable depths in one breath, or lifting weighty objects, superhuman feats never cease to amaze; pulling them off could be a matter of training, willpower, genetics, or something more mysterious.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: All over the world, there are giant monoliths that ancient ancestors carved out of solid rock.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Throughout history, humans have buried their dead in caves or chambers, in pyramids or in some form of a tomb; ancient tombs were visual memorials for the dead; in China, a vast necropolis was constructed as a way to connect to the afterlife.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: During World War II, a number of persistent mysteries were born, including unexplained stories about everything from lost gold to secret societies and highly advanced technology.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Examining if modern technology and scientific knowledge can help protect people from almost anything, including natural disasters, or if vulnerability remains a factor.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Vampires and Werewolves are human monsters, creatures of the night. But, could they actually be... real?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: What gives animals extraordinary powers? We like to think of ourselves as the peak of evolution--but what if we're wrong?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Why is it that America's greatest monuments continue to enthrall us decades--and sometimes centuries--after their creation?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Despite all of our modern technology, there are aspects of some vanishings that are bizarre and simply can't be explained.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: For centuries, humanity has looked up at the Moon with a sense of wonder. But is the Moon just a rock floating in space? Or could it hold profound secrets?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: What motivates someone to steal? Is it just for the money, or could a criminal have other reasons for pulling off a particularly daring robbery?

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A horrific quadruple homicide goes unsolved for over a decade; while one investigation goes cold, another heats up as the search for a missing couple holds the key to unravelling the secrets of a serial killer.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, Mich., but her family and friends don't believe it; as police dig deep to get to the truth, they discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The community of Macon, Ga., is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex; the shocking discovery of a body leads investigators uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A jilted lover takes to the internet to stalk her ex and threaten his girlfriend; when she finally follows through on her violent threats, detectives find themselves entangled in a deadly web of deception.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The peaceful town of Mountain City, Tenn., is rocked when a beloved young couple are found brutally murdered in their home; as police search for their killer, they uncover a family enmeshed in sinister secrets and lies.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn; the investigation into her death takes her family on a journey into the dark heart of a monster who has been at their side all along.

programme.title: Behind the Headlines
programme.desc: Interviews with people who knew Markoff and his victims, as well as investigators and prosecutors who speak on camera about the case for the very first time.

programme.desc: A young, pregnant woman is found dead of an apparent suicide in Saginaw, Mich., but her family and friends don't believe it; as police dig deep to get to the truth, they discover a shocking secret they never saw coming.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The community of Macon, Ga., is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex; the shocking discovery of a body leads investigators uncomfortably close to home.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A jilted lover takes to the internet to stalk her ex and threaten his girlfriend; when she finally follows through on her violent threats, detectives find themselves entangled in a deadly web of deception.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: The peaceful town of Mountain City, Tenn., is rocked when a beloved young couple are found brutally murdered in their home; as police search for their killer, they uncover a family enmeshed in sinister secrets and lies.

programme.title: Murder in the 21st
programme.desc: A sudden illness takes hold of a beloved doctor, leaving her family helpless as the illness takes a fatal turn; the investigation into her death takes her family on a journey into the dark heart of a monster who has been at their side all along.

programme.title: Behind the Headlines
programme.desc: Interviews with people who knew Markoff and his victims, as well as investigators and prosecutors who speak on camera about the case for the very first time.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A family faces off with violent attackers trying to rob its jewelry store; two young women flee from a driver who is out to get them on a terrifying road trip; convenience and crime collide at a bank ATM.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A thief with a knife and a big idea meets a store employee and his bigger blade; a ride share driver has his evening shattered as gunfire rips through his truck; a devious plot involving a bank teller and an ATM lead to a near death encounter.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A local trip becomes a harrowing ordeal for one family when they're surrounded by an angry mob that attacks their vehicle; a laundromat owner is beaten by unruly patrons from the business next door; a property manager is confronted by a gunman.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime
programme.desc: A typical Sunday morphs into a gunfight when two armed men invade a family's home; an unsuspecting impound lot worker checks out a disturbance and is nearly mowed down by an irate woman in a two-ton truck; a car owner tries to stop a carjacking.

programme.title: I Survived a Crime

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police suspect a gay man murdered a woman because she became too friendly with his boy friend. And a man goes on a monstrous crime spree, abducting five women

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Forty-one years after the crime, a woman implicates her brother and cousin in the murder of a policeman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: After U.S. Navy sailor Andrew Muns disappears in 1968, the Navy claims that Muns went AWOL from his ship.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: The testimony of three prison inmates helps convict a man who killed a woman.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: One family faces two unsolved murders of their loved ones. It takes thirteen years for detectives to uncover the one missing clue that can lead them to the killer: the hidden crime scene.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: Just after the last day of school in 1984, 15-year-old Reesa Trexler is found murdered in her grandparents' home.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: In July of 1970, the brutal murder of single mom Loretta Jones leaves four-year-old Heidi motherless. Nearly 40 years later, she vows to solve her mother's cold case.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Montana detectives track down a man who murdered his wife.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A mother is suspected in the murders of two of her daughters, when her third daughter finally convinces police to reopen two cold cases.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: On a summer night in 1987 a mother worries and waits for her 19-year-old daughter to come home. But Diana never comes home and she's found raped and strangled.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: Police solve a murder when divers find a skeleton in a car.

programme.title: Cold Case Files Classic
programme.desc: A highly-regarded California arson investigator is suspected of murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: The body of Lori Nesson is found in a ditch in 1974, yet her death is not ruled a homicide. After four decades, the cause of death is changed to homicide.

programme.title: Cold Case Files
programme.desc: A fire in January 2007 claims the life of WWII vet Bennie Angelo. A closer look at the crime scene reveals Bennie was dead before the fire, bumping an arson case up to homicide.

programme.desc: Looks at how law enforcers stick with cases for many years, using fresh evidence to win convictions or to free prisoners who were wrongfully jailed.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a man claims to have found his wife dead in the bathtub, the woman's daughters suspect there may be more to the story.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A hunting safari in Zambia's Kafue National Park ends in a nightmare when a shot rings out from the cabin of dentist Dr. Larry Rudolph and his wife Bianca.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When a complicated Texas love triangle ends in murder, a pink gun leads to an arrest, until new evidence prompts investigators to rethink the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: When Susan Woods doesn't show up for work, she is soon discovered dead in her bathtub; as police search for answers, they find a trail of victims.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The security cameras at the home of a wife and mother of three's home may hold the key to solving the mystery of her disappearance.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A popular high school student is found murdered in her bed; two students help police solve the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Twenty-five years after a man involved in a love triangle is stabbed to death, detectives reopen the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A chance encounter by custom agents leads to a break in the case of a mother who disappeared days before she was supposed to move to a new city with her young son; 20 years after the incident, a witness speaks out.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.desc: A mother of two mysteriously vanishes from her parents' Michigan home while going to check the mailbox, leaving her phone and identification behind; police declare her dead without discovering a body.

programme.desc: When a model and up-and-coming YouTube celebrity turns up dead, police question her husband in the hope he can shed some light on the situation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman accused of attempting to hire a hit man to kill her husband.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Key players in the case of Rod Covlin, a New York man who is found guilty of murdering his wife for her $5.3 million fortune and attempting to frame his then-teenage daughter, share their stories.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A brilliant woman who rose from poverty and became a successful criminal defense attorney is murdered; investigators look into her clients and follow a bizarre string of clues.

programme.desc: A Florida father is determined to find out what happened to his daughter after her fatal fall from a penthouse apartment in Belgium.

programme.desc: When a graduate student is shot dead outside of her North Carolina home, a 911 caller leads detectives to believe the victim's fiance is the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.desc: A woman goes for a walk during a snowstorm and never returns.

programme.desc: The investigation into a newlywed's disappearance focuses on her job as a CIA employee as a possible clue.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.desc: John Ross learns the value of family when he must choose between blood and oil. Sue Ellen and Rebecca both find themselves victims of men who could destroy their lives.

programme.desc: Pamela Rebecca Barnes schemes with John Ross to fulfill her father's desire for revenge. Ryland's mother (JUDITH LIGHT) proves just as evil as her son.

programme.title: Dallas

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: J.R. works to undermine Pamela, forcing John Ross to choose between a Ewing and a Barnes. Cliff Barnes (KEN KERCHEVAL) returns to meet with an unlikely visitor.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: John Ross' plot to take over Ewing Energies solidifies; Christopher changes tactics with Pamela Barnes; and an enemy from the Ewings' past resurfaces.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: In the aftermath of John Ross and Sue Ellen's coup, Bobby's brother Gary (TED SHACKELFORD) helps him retaliate. Christopher and John Ross clash in a winner-takes-all car race.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: J.R. Ewing finally meets his end. The family strives to set aside their differences and mourn together. Accompanied by many characters from J.R.'s past, the Ewings bury their own.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: Bobby, Christopher and John Ross work on J.R.'s masterpiece. J.R.'s will has lasting effects on the family legacy. Sue Ellen tries to get Gary (TED SHACKELFORD) out of Dallas.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: Pamela's mother, Afton Cooper (AUDREY LANDERS), returns to Dallas. Emma is put in the middle of her father and grandmother's relationship, pushing her closer to Drew.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: The Ewings' investigation of a conspiracy continuing to blame Christopher for recent events brings revelations in line with J.R.'s masterpiece. A new adversary is added to the mix.

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: After Cliff (KEN KERCHEVAL) and Ryland put Ewing Energies on the verge of collapse, the Ewings battle back. Christopher gets closer to finding his mother.

programme.title: Dallas

programme.title: Dallas
programme.desc: John Ross and Pamela make a shocking discovery about an enemy's location the night J.R. was killed, compelling Bobby to reveal more of J.R.'s master plan. LEE MAJORS guest stars.

programme.title: Dallas

programme.title: Dallas

programme.title: Bloomberg Technology
programme.desc: Technology is not only becoming an increasingly important part of people's lives but also of the American economy. "Bloomberg Technology" takes a look at how the latest happenings in the tech industry are affecting the U.S. markets. Analysis, commentary, interviews and interactive graphics are among the staples of the show that help viewers understand the impact the technology sector has on the economy. The show, which was originally titled "Bloomberg West," is anchored by Emily Chang in San Francisco.

programme.title: Bloomberg Originals
programme.desc: Bloomberg Originals offers bold takes for curious minds on today’s biggest topics. Covering stories you haven’t seen and viewpoints you haven’t heard, you’ll discover cinematic, data-led documentaries that investigate the intersection of business and culture. programme.title: Cometa
programme.desc: Un chico pierde todas las cosas que lo motivan a vivir. Se ha quedado sin trabajo, casa y familia, pero en su recorrido por las calles se encuentra a Cometa, un perro callejero.

programme.title: Las viejas del sicario
programme.desc: Una película de acción de narcos.

programme.title: Mariachi gringo
programme.desc: Edward, un apasionado por la música mexicana, se siente atrapado en la rutina de la pequeña ciudad donde reside. Con el propósito de huir de todo, Edward se muda a México para convertirse en un mariachi.

programme.title: Soy de la frontera verde
programme.desc: Don Hugo un poderoso narcotraficante, muere en circunstacias muy extrañas, aunque todo indica que lo envenenaron. Su hija, doña Fernanda Morales, no dejará cabos sueltos y vengará la muerte de su padre encontrando al culpable.

programme.title: Un ángel en peligro
programme.desc: La felicidad de una familia se quiebra cuando secuestran a su hija. Al mismo tiempo, se descubrirá la red de engaños entre su sobrino y su esposa, además de un nexo con un narcotraficante.

programme.title: A ellas les gustan mayores
programme.desc: Ricardo está casado con Miranda, una bella mujer de afortunada posición social. Sin embargo, Ricardo la engaña con una mujer más joven que él.

programme.title: Cigarrito Bañado
programme.desc: Lucio huye de una deuda y de un amigo peligroso. En el camino conoce a Ximena, una mujer que seduce a los hombres y luego les roba el dinero.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Marisa se sale con la suya y obtiene un supuesto regalo de Leonardo: la joya de Jade; luego se aprovecha para dar de qué hablar a la prensa. Jade cambia de identidad, roba un bolso.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Said le confiesa a Jade que ha tratado de sacarla de su corazón, sin lograrlo. Ella se conmueve, baila la danza del sable y viven una noche de pasión. Lucas se molesta por el collar de Marisa.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Cristina se da cuenta de que se casó con otro solo por darle celos a su ex. Tres años después vuelve a Miami sin un peso y busca a Leonardo. Latiffa está embarazada, Mohamed está feliz.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura
programme.desc: Una historia que se desenvuelve a mediados del siglo XIX en Brasil y relata la vida de Isaura, una esclava mestiza, hija de la esclava del Comendador y el capataz de la hacienda.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura
programme.desc: Una historia que se desenvuelve a mediados del siglo XIX en Brasil y relata la vida de Isaura, una esclava mestiza, hija de la esclava del Comendador y el capataz de la hacienda.

programme.title: La esclava Isaura

programme.title: Mi amor de las estrellas
programme.desc: Min-joon profesa su amor por Song-yi y luego desaparece. Con el paso del tiempo, Song-yi y otros creen que lo han visto.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Adaptación de uno de los libros más reconocidos de la Biblia, que aborda la historia del origen de la humanidad, invitando a entender el presente, volviendo al principio de todo. La caída de Lucifer, la vida de Adán y Eva, Noé y el diluvio, y otros.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Melissa queda devastada al saber que Görkem debe marcharse y confronta a Fevzi. Necati intenta usar a Reyhan para manipular a Cüneyt. Orhan amenaza a Büsra si se atreve a revelar lo que sabe. Mahinur y Metin temen por la seguridad de Melissa.

programme.title: Moisés y los diez mandamientos
programme.desc: La historia de Moisés desde su nacimiento y llegada a manos de la princesa Henutmire hasta llevar a su pueblo a la Tierra Prometida. Su crianza como un verdadero príncipe egipcio junto a su tío Ramsés.

programme.title: El laberinto de Alicia
programme.desc: Alicia Vega, psicóloga del colegio Los Ángeles, especialista en prevención y tratamiento de abusos sexuales a menores, inicia una investigación cuando Valentina, una niña adorable y frágil, parece estar en la mira de un abusador.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Jade está en Miami, eso la hace feliz, Cristina se entera y se lo cuenta a Lucas. Él la busca en todos los hoteles, hasta que la encuentra y la toma de un brazo para llevársela lejos.

programme.title: Eres mi estrella
programme.desc: La compañía que maneja el grupo ídolo ANJELL insiste en contratar un nuevo cantante porque la voz del cantante principal Tae Kyung, ya no es la misma.

programme.desc: School is coming to a close and vacation season is getting underway. Tonight, some ideas to keep the troops entertained! Golf in the city? Nicole Estaphan does a deep dive into historic video games in Rhode Island, while Erika Tarantal is aiming for the bullseye at a darts emporium. Board games, pinball, and more options to keep everyone active and entertained and now has 50 triathlons under his belt.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Are you ready to get a little bit spooky? We are getting in the mood for Halloween with a little history on how it got to where it is today. We walk you through some haunts in Salem, some well-known, and some not. Salem isn’t the only spot with ghostly ties; we get a tour of some of Boston’s haunted spots, including the Boston Common. Ted Reinstein takes a trip with paranormal investigators aboard an (allegedly) haunted ship in Mystic, Conn. And if you’re in the mood to experience your own Halloween thrills, we visit two local attractions still scaring visitors year after year.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: As temperatures drop, you may be hunting for indoor activities. Pac-Man and pinball enthusiasts, rejoice! In Norwood, a retro video game enthusiast has built his dream business, Hometown Arcade.

programme.title: Bringing Down The House: The Bombing of Harvey's Casino
programme.desc: In the summer of 1980, two men wheeled what looked like an IBM computer into a Lake Tahoe casino. The events that followed rocked the industry, baffled bomb technicians, and changed the lives of a criminal’s and a casino magnate’s family forever.

programme.title: The Lost Children of Carlisle
programme.desc: A powerful look at the history of Native American boarding schools as told through the stories of tribal members and their surviving family members, who endured an educational system founded on the concept “Kill the Indian in him, and save the man.”

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight we learn about the day jobs of local comedians, from New Hampshire’s Juston McKinney (a onetime sheriff’s deputy in Maine) to a Boston-area comic who helps families plan funerals, and another who is – believe it or not – a taxidermist.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Couldn’t we all use a laugh? Tonight we connect with local comics who find “funny” everywhere they look. We meet up with Worcester teacher-turned-standup Orlando Baxter, and talk to Stephanie Peters, who used laughter to raise funds for the people of Ukraine. We check out a brand new comedy club in Beverly and connect with former Saturday Night Live writer Sam Jay, who reflects on her Dorchester roots. And is it possible to teach funny? At Emerson College, we find out.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: When two Northeastern University students felt excluded from an activity they loved they created a welcoming community of their own with Lonely Bones Skate Co., while pastry chef Gloria Cabral has won awards for her own talent but she is most proud of mentoring a new generation of pastry chefs. Tonight’s edition of “Gamechangers” focuses on people who are quietly making a difference right here in our community – from a Dorchester artist creating a new “face” for playing cards to a team making the sport of tennis accessible to all.

programme.desc: Anthony Everett tours a unique home for sale, where the proceeds are targeted for charity thanks to the wishes of its prominent late owner. We travel to Great Barrington, where a couple has lovingly restored a chapel on the grounds of a former private school, built in memory of three members of the community who died tragically – and now a respite for hikers along the Appalachian Trail. In Concord, Anthony dines at a special cafe staffed by incarcerated individuals who are learning new skills. And in Brighton, we visit a local co-op community that supports young adults who are experiencing homelessness.

We are also introduced to high-powered almond butter, courtsy of local Bear Butter and discover how local researchers are trying to tame nut allergies in patients.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: It’s New Hampshire’s second-largest county, home to some of its best-known towns, and to famed Franconia Notch. Tonight Ted Reinstein shares the autumn beauty of Grafton County, N.H. He discovers how “The Notch” was once saved from development, and explores scenic views along the Cross-New Hampshire Adventure Trail. Hard to believe it’s been 20 years since the Old Man in the Mountain crumbled; Ted meets the team who designed “profilers” that help simulate the rocky view. And at Polly’s Pancake Parlor, Ted digs into a half-stack and catches up with old friends.

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Who says you can’t go home again? Tonight we hitch a ride with Nicole Estaphan to her hometown of Grafton, Massachusetts. This rural Central Mass. town may be small but it packs big flavors - warm loaves at Bread Guy Breads and a global selection of fine wine and cheeses at Pecorino. Grafton is also home to the world's largest collection of antique Willard Clocks. And far from Tufts University’s Medford campus is the university’s Grafton training ground for future veterinarians, Cummings School of Veterinary Medicine.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: If you love all things 19th Century (think Bridgerton or Downton Abbey), impeccable gardens, and antique decor, then you will enjoy tonight’s trip to some of the area’s great estates. We begin at Glen Magna Farms in Danvers. Now an events venue and public park, the estate was once the summer retreat for the Peabody and Endicott families (purchased for a mere $4,000). We tour the Nichols House Museum, a Beacon Hill brownstone whose former owner inspired a musical. Also tonight, prepare to be awed by the grounds at Blithewold, an estate that was only owned by women.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: A look at art, cuisine, and advocacy, all infused with culture in celebration of Hispanic Heritage Month. We take a look at removing the stigma around accessing mental health resources with a counselor with Venezuelan roots and talk with a Seekonk woman using arts and crafts to do the same. We meet a husband and wife from Cambridge sharing cultural stories through their Pan-Latin music. Anthony Everett learns the art of empanada-creation with a local Argentinian chef and we catch up with a Brazillian artist focused on creating sustainable fashion with nature.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Just six miles from downtown Boston, Malden is experiencing a renaissance. We stop by District Kitchen for handmade noodles and dumplings and check out the local art at Gallery at 57. Meanwhile, if you think you know Paul Revere’s turf, we have news for you from the town of Canton – where we hit the Paul Revere Heritage Site and Northern Spy restaurant, which focuses on locally-sourced ingredients. Finally, Nicole Estaphan heads to the Metrowest community of Holliston where she meets a father-daughter artist team and submerges herself in a minus-200-degree cryotherapy tank.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle

programme.title: The Best of Chronicle: Main Streets and Back Roads
programme.desc: Historic Harwich is heaven for beach lovers…but it’s also filled with history, abundant natural beauty, and artists working to keep Cape Cod traditions alive. Erika Tarantal meets a local carver who makes duck decoys in the tradition of a renowned local craftsman. We visit a cranberry bog and a lavender farm, and at a Harwich Mariners game, meet the folks trying to bring the Cape Cod Baseball League’s Hall of Fame back to life. Finally, no trip to the Cape is complete without some reading material; we hit a local stop along the Cape Cod Bookstore Trail.

programme.title: Game Gone Wild: The Socker Slam Story
programme.desc: A stranger than fiction documentary that chronicles a semi-scripted extreme sporting league that premiered in 2000. Socker Slam took elements of wrestling, rugby and “butts up” shenanigans and body slammed them into a soccer drama.

programme.title: Searching for Johnny
programme.desc: (2022) The disappearance of Johnny Gosch is one of Iowa's longest running, and most notorious mysteries. In 1982, the 12-year-old paperboy in West Des Moines vanished without a trace. Forty years later, KCCI uncovers where the investigation stands.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Tonight NewsCenter 5’s Maria Stephanos joins us with profiles of local luminaries who have made giving back to their communities their mission.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: February is American Heart Month, and Nicole Estaphan is sharing personal stories that stress the importance of awareness, early screening, and prevention. Nicole meets a transplant recipient who had no warning of his life-threatening disease, and a young mom who suffered a heart attack while pregnant – one of a growing number of younger patients who experience a cardiac event. She talks to doctors about risk and the importance of a heart-healthy lifestyle. Finally, Nicole shares her own diagnosis of a cardiac condition that affects 20 million American adults.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: The Head of the Charles regatta began with a wonky stopwatch back in 1965 – and is now one of the world’s most famous rowing spectacles. If you’ve ever wondered what all the fuss is on the Charles River each October, we spent the last year connecting with elite racers, weekend warriors, and people who are committed to expanding access to rowing for all. On the eve of this year’s races, an insider’s look – it isn’t just for preppies anymore.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Hidden Gems aren’t hard to find in New England (if you know where to look!). Tonight we follow the breadcrumbs to a French bakery tucked into a liquor store in Milford. Forget candlepins - we’re checking out a duckpin bowling alley, and dining on the “Mystery Monday” menu at Metacom Kitchen in Warren, R.I.. And tucked into a former Methodist Church in Charlton, Mass., is a sewing “sanctuary” that’s still lifting spirits. Plus, we head to Gillette Stadium to meet the New England Revolution -- a record-breaking team that’s been hiding in plain sight.

programme.desc: Tonight we’re back on the hunt for hidden history. Anthony Everett visits Brockton where he rides on a historic fire engine that battled the devastating Strand Theatre fire in 1941, and a local museum remembers the 13 lives lost. We take a stroll with the author of “Boston’s Oldest Buildings and Where to Find Them.” And tucked away among the storefronts inside the Prudential Center are actual relics of three Catholic saints.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: When is a bait shop more than a bait shop? When it holds generations’ worth of local history, in the form of cherished photographs. For decades, the late owner of Surfland on Plum Island photographed locals who had landed huge fish, and her family continues the tradition today. We also meet a group of Italian divers who traveled to the U.S. to explore the Andrea Doria, the ocean liner that sank off Nantucket in 1956 and has intrigued divers ever since. And in the tiny town of West Townsend, we peruse the largest collection of antique American tall case clocks for sale in the United States.

programme.title: WCVB Chronicle
programme.desc: Ted Reinstein is looking up, down, around, and above to discover quirky systems, codes, and features around Boston that are “hiding in plain sight!” Parts of the city are encircled by a high-wire “eruv” – Ted will tell you what that is. We meet a Boston man who makes art in out-of-the-way places (and manages to live rent-free in the city). Boston officials share the story behind those tiny colored plastic disks embedded in city streets. And while the 1,200 fire alarm boxes in Boston may look like a relic - they work! We meet the team charged with maintaining them.
